title: Sendai, Miyagi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sendai, Miyagi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sendai is a city in Miyagi with a population of 1,097,000. The largest city in Tohoku, known as the ‘City of Trees,’ with a vibrant food scene and the stunning Sendai Tanabata Festival.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
